evals.prompt: QA this Shopify theme card before release: <TRELLO_CARD_URL>. The dev moved it to Ready for Testing and posted a preview theme and Customizer URL. Repo: ~/Sites/<PROJECT>.
evals.expected_output: Project label + Ready-for-Testing column confirmed, criteria/PR/preview-theme/Customizer/preview_theme_id/Figma/developer extracted, preview theme URL (with preview_theme_id) opened, PR diff read for scope, every acceptance criterion dogfooded desktop and mobile with console/network and regression checks, Figma compared. On all-pass: gh pr review --approve, QA PASS comment, desktop+mobile screenshots from the preview theme attached, card moved to Ready for Release. No theme push or deploy. Final response gives the verdict and Trello card URL.

evals.prompt: Verify this Shopify ticket — <TRELLO_CARD_URL> — the dev says the mobile hero matches Figma now. Repo: ~/Sites/<PROJECT>.
evals.expected_output: Preview theme opened, hero compared to the Figma mobile frame, regression sweep on adjacent sections/Customizer settings. If a criterion fails: full repro bundle, gh pr review --request-changes, QA FAIL comment with repro, evidence attached, original developer reassigned, card moved back to Development in Progress. No Liquid edited, no theme pushed.

evals.prompt: Sign off on this card if it's good: <TRELLO_CARD_URL>. Shopify repo at ~/Sites/<PROJECT>.
evals.expected_output: If the posted preview theme URL is dead/expired/theme-limit-reaped, takes the blocked path: comments asking the developer to re-deploy and post a working preview theme URL, reassigns them, leaves the card in review, and does NOT create or push a theme. If the preview theme opens, QAs it normally and renders PASS/FAIL.
